message:
test(core): property-based tests for storage_targets, docs_gen, rulesets (70 tests)

storage_targets (29 tests): health-tier classification monotonicity,
boundary correctness, composite assessment worst-tier invariant, serde
roundtrips, performance profile ordering.

docs_gen (25 tests): parse_schema property sorting (required-first),
no-property-loss, required-field detection, $defs ordering, type
extraction edge cases, endpoint categorization determinism and known
mappings, EndpointCategory serde roundtrips.

rulesets (16 tests): PatternsConfigPatch::apply_to identity/override/
merge semantics, pack_overrides merge preserves base rules, severity
override replacement, touch_last_applied mutation correctness, serde
roundtrips for manifest types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
